sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n3471" key="a)kribolo/gos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀκρῑβο-λόγος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n3471.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">precise in argument</tr_>, in pl., Timo <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0086.tlg010.perseus-grc1:25:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">25.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
